description: PRD-28: Design consistency pass 2 — transitions, dark mode gaps, and spacing patterns

userStories.title: Add transition-colors to interactive elements missing smooth hover states
userStories.description: Several components have hover states without transition-colors, causing abrupt color changes. Add transition-colors to: (1) ApiErrorMessage.jsx retry button (line 27), (2) ApplicationRowActions.jsx RowMenu button (line 50), (3) ApplicationRowActions.jsx delete menu item (line 26), (4) ApplicationTimeline.jsx expand button (line 91), (5) ContactCard.jsx ping button (line 64), (6) ContactCard.jsx unlink button (line 75).
acceptanceCriteria: ApplicationRowActions delete menu item has transition-colors
ContactCard ping and unlink buttons have transition-colors

userStories.title: Add missing dark mode variants to hover states in ApplicationRowActions
userStories.description: ApplicationRowActions.jsx delete menu item (line 26) has hover:bg-red-50 but no dark:hover variant. Add dark:text-red-400 and dark:hover:bg-red-900/20. Also ensure the regular menu items on lines 16 and 21 have proper dark mode applied.
acceptanceCriteria: Archive/Unarchive menu items maintain dark mode consistency

userStories.title: Add transition-colors and dark mode to JobRow hover state
userStories.description: JobRow.jsx (line 24) has className='flex items-center gap-4 border-b border-gray-100 px-4 hover:bg-gray-50' without transition-colors and missing dark:border-gray-700 and dark:hover:bg-gray-700. Add both transition-colors and dark mode variants.

userStories.title: Add transition-colors to ApplicationRowActions RowMenu icon button
userStories.description: ApplicationRowActions.jsx RowMenu button (line 50) has className='rounded p-1 text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-gray-700...' missing transition-colors. Add transition-colors and ensure dark mode has dark:hover:bg-gray-700 dark:hover:text-gray-200.

userStories.title: Add transition-colors to CommandPalette command items
userStories.description: CommandPalette.jsx command items (around line 180-200 in the render section) have hover:bg-gray-50 without transition-colors. Find the command item button/div and add transition-colors. Verify dark:hover:bg-gray-700 is present.
acceptanceCriteria: Command items have dark:hover:bg-gray-700 or equivalent dark mode

userStories.title: Standardize dropdown menu item spacing across components
userStories.description: Multiple dropdown menus use px-4 py-2 for menu items (ApplicationRowActions lines 16, 21, 26). Create or adopt a MENU_ITEM token in designTokens.js with: 'w-full px-4 py-2 text-left text-sm transition-colors'. Apply it to ApplicationRowActions menu items and any other dropdown menus in the codebase.
acceptanceCriteria: MENU_ITEM token exists in designTokens.js (or reuse existing pattern)
ApplicationRowActions menu items use standardized token

userStories.title: Add focus:ring-offset-2 to interactive elements missing proper focus ring offset
userStories.description: Several components have focus states but use non-standard focus ring offsets. Audit and standardize: (1) ApplicationRowActions RowMenu button (line 50) — check if focus:ring-offset-2 is present, (2) ApplicationTimeline expand button (line 91) — verify focus:ring-offset-2, (3) ContactCard buttons (lines 64, 75) — ensure focus:ring-offset-2.
acceptanceCriteria: No focus:ring-offset-0 or focus:ring-offset-1 on non-intentional elements

userStories.title: Fix AnalyticsCharts CustomTooltip to use design tokens or consistent styling
userStories.description: AnalyticsCharts.jsx CustomTooltip div (line 35) uses hardcoded 'rounded-lg border border-border-default bg-white px-3 py-2 shadow-card text-sm dark:border-gray-700 dark:bg-gray-800'. This should either adopt a design token (CARD_BASE with size override) or be extracted as a constant. Consider whether this could use CARD_BASE + additional padding overrides.
acceptanceCriteria: Either adopts CARD_BASE or is defined as a named constant
